title: ICAI Bolsters CA Profession with Advanced AI Certification and Sarvam AI Partnership
content:
# ICAI Bolsters CA Profession with Advanced AI Certification and Sarvam AI Partnership

Ek important update hai! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne profession ko AI-ready banane ke liye major steps announce kiye hain.

During the AI Innovation Summit (AIS) 2026, held from June 26-27, 2026, in New Delhi:

*   **Advanced AI Certification (AICA Level 3) Launched:** ICAI has rolled out the AICA Level 3 advanced AI certification programme. This is specifically for members who have already completed the Level 2 certification, aiming to further enhance their AI competencies.
*   **MoU Signed with Sarvam AI:** ICAI ne Sarvam AI ke saath ek Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) sign kiya hai. This collaboration will focus on AI training, capacity building, professional development, joint research, and developing AI-centric learning resources for Chartered Accountants. Sarvam AI is known for developing indigenous AI technology.
*   **"AI Essentials for CAs" Released:** Ek new publication, "AI Essentials for Chartered Accountants," bhi launch ki gayi hai to help professionals understand aur adopt AI in their practice.
*   **Vision:** These initiatives underscore ICAI's commitment to equipping CAs with the skills needed to navigate the evolving digital economy and contribute to the vision of Viksit Bharat 2047.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/post.html?post_id=22709)

*Published on: 29 June 2026*
